YouTube 	Works for most markets. If your product requires a demonstra-
tion, and your customer needs to evidence of your product in
action. Use when your product requires strict targeting. Should
be considered when setting up almost all retargeting (looping)
campaigns.
LinkedIn 	Use when targeting prospects based on their professional
roles (eg business software sales). Use if promoting B2B offers.
Google 	Can use in most markets. Use search network if you require in
market buyers, i.e. people actively looking for exactly what it
is you’re promoting. Should be considered when setting up
almost all retargeting (looping) campaigns.
Twitter 	Works for most markets. If you have a younger Avatar, this is an
ideal traffic platform.
Rented
Email Lists
Great for offers that require interest targeting, and for sales
funnels that are too aggressive for heavily regulated platforms
such as Google.
Facebook 	Works for most markets and most. Provided your sales fun-
nel and product offering satisfy Facebook’s advertising policy,
it is almost always a good idea to advertise on this platform.
Should be considered when setting up almost all retargeting
(looping) campaigns.
Banner Ads 	Great for scaling proven campaigns. Use when your ideal pros-
pect does not have to be actively searching for your product.
Should be considered when setting up almost all retargeting
(looping) campaigns.
PPV 	Be careful with this traffic source. It can annoy your prospect if
done haphazardly. Used mainly for mass market offerings only.
CPA 	Be careful here. Used for scale. Ideal traffic source for proven
campaigns. You must know what the action is worth to you
before paying for it on a CPA basis.
Content Discovery
Platforms
Be careful here. Only consider if promoting mass market offer-
ings. Test very small at first.
TRAFFIC CHANNEL: 	BEST USED WHEN:
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 1 of 1 --
